case_title: PICKFORD, MARLENE CELIA VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PICKFORD, MARLENE CELIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PICKFORD, MARLENE CELIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ALLSTATE INS. COMP. (MARIN WATER CLAIMS) RETURNED SIGNED.
